title: Finding healing
summary: Karen Truelove, a Traditional Healer at the Dena’ina Wellness Center, leads a healing circle at Tyotkas Elder Center for boarding school survivors and others who were affected. From left are Tina Mulcahy, Mary Hunt, Tom Titus and Mary Lou Bottorff. Healing circle provides space to address boarding school trauma Last summer, a group of Elders approached the Tribe’s Traditional Healer about starting a healing circle at Tyotkas Elder Center for survivors of boarding school abuse. While the initial focus for the Growing Through It, Healing the Generations healing circle was boarding school survivors, the policies and social attitudes of the boarding school era caused trauma for many people, whether an individual was forced to attend a boarding sc...

title: Yukon-Kuskokwim Health Corporation is awarded NIH ComPASS funds for Neqkiuryaraq project
summary: YKHC is pleased to share that its Neqkiuryaraq (or The Art of Preparing Food ) project was awarded $5 million dollars over a span of five years to work towards improvements in health, food sovereignty and food security. This work will be done in collaboration with partners at the Alaska Native Triba...

title: A New Kind of National Park

title: Shalane Frost
summary: Backcounty Ski Racer Embraces the North Shalane Frost has won pretty much every ultra-distance ski race in Alaska. In March alone this year, she cleaned up in the Homer Epic 100k, the Chena River to Ridge 50-miler, and the 45-mile Tanana River Challenge, closing out the month by defending her title...

title: Spruce Grouse
summary: Alaska’s true king of the uplands by Joe Jackson This is a tale of two spruce grouse, and it begins in mid-September. title: US corn ending stocks down 1% from last year, soybean ending stocks down 2%
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) Grain Stocks report released today showed that old crop corn stocks on hand as of Sept. 1, 2023, totaled 1.36 billion bushels, down 1% from Sept. 1, 2022.
